Class LoopContractInternalRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractLoopContractRule
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.LoopContractInternalRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
InfFlowLoopContractInternalRule
public class LoopContractInternalRule extends AbstractLoopContractRule

Rule for the application of LoopContracts.

This splits the goal into two branches:

  1. Validity
  2. Precondition
  3. Usage

See Also:
  • LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp

    • createApp

    • apply

      public @NonNull ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, RuleApp ruleApp) throws RuleAbortException
      Description copied from interface: RuleExecutor
      applies the given rule application to the specified goal
      Parameters:
      goal - the goal that the rule application should refer to.
      ruleApp - the rule application that is executed.
      Returns:
      List of the goals created by the rule which have to be proved. If this is a close-goal-taclet ( this.closeGoal () ), the first goal of the return list is the goal that should be closed (with the constraint this taclet is applied under).
      Throws:
      RuleAbortException
